# Risperidone 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Risperidone 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Risperidone</strong> 目前有 <strong>28 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Risperidone 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Treatment of schizophrenia in adults for whom tolerability and effectiveness has been established with oral risperidone.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L1</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>manic bipolar affective disorder（100.0%）</li>
<li>autism spectrum disorder（99.8%）</li>
<li>autism susceptibility 1（99.8%）</li>
<li>gaze palsy, familial horizontal, with progressive scoliosis（99.8%）</li>
<li>asperger syndrome, susceptibility to（99.7%）</li>
<li>amelocerebrohypohidrotic syndrome（99.7%）</li>
<li>Phelan-McDermid syndrome（99.6%）</li>
<li>trichotillomania（99.5%）</li>
<li>major affective disorder（99.1%）</li>
<li>bipolar disorder（98.9%）</li>
<li>Tourette syndrome（98.8%）</li>
<li>intellectual disability（98.7%）</li>
<li>autism, susceptibility to（98.7%）</li>
<li>chromosome 15q11.2 deletion syndrome（98.6%）</li>
<li>16q24.3 microdeletion syndrome（98.6%）</li>
<li>schizophrenia（98.5%）</li>
<li>occipital pachygyria and polymicrogyria（98.3%）</li>
<li>attention deficit-hyperactivity disorder（98.3%）</li>
<li>distal 17p13.3 microdeletion syndrome（98.2%）</li>
<li>epsilon-trimethyllysine hydroxylase deficiency（98.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/risperidone/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
